name: tavo-pos
description: Tavo POS — a Toast-style restaurant point-of-sale (backend + frontend) with Stripe test-mode payments.

scripts.test: node test/store.test.mjs && node test/gateways.test.mjs && node test/api.test.mjs
scripts.mobile:add: npm run mobile:build && npx cap add ios && npx cap add android
scripts.mobile:sync: npm run mobile:build && npx cap sync
scripts.mobile:ios: npm run mobile:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.mobile:android: npm run mobile:sync && npx cap open android
